heuristics.heuristic: Avoid spawning exploratory scout workers in this project/runtime configuration with unsupported external model defaults; prefer the known-supported default executor or reuse existing scout outputs unless a new scout is strictly necessary.
heuristics.context: Three scout processes failed with the same unsupported-model error while contract planning succeeded from existing outputs; repeated retries would waste tokens without advancing the goal.

heuristics.heuristic: When a worker has already published a namespace-complete artifact set (for example `contract:*` or `contract:phase2:*`), do not allow another live producer to keep owning the same namespace; collapse to one producer and proceed to observation.
heuristics.context: Repeated duplicate-producer collisions on contract namespaces caused control-plane inflation without improving artifacts.

heuristics.heuristic: Treat observation boundaries like artifact namespaces: exactly one authoritative observer should own a given phase boundary at a time, and if all observers for a produced boundary are removed, immediately respawn one before allowing downstream work.
heuristics.context: Repeated duplicate-observer churn and accidental elimination of all observers on the Phase 2 contract boundary.

heuristics.heuristic: Ownership conservation guardrail: when removing duplicate producers or observers, preserve exactly one authoritative owner for each required namespace or boundary; never prune a required boundary to zero owners.
heuristics.context: Repeated overshoot after duplicate cleanup removed all live observers for an already-produced Phase 2 boundary.
